---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working right
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A short description of what went wrong.

## What you expected

What should have happened instead.

## How to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See the bug

## Environment

- Browser + version: (e.g., Chrome 120, Safari on iPhone)
- Where you're running the app: localhost / Netlify / Vercel / other
- Did the setup steps in [SETUP.md](../../SETUP.md) run without errors? Yes / No

## Screenshots or console errors

If you can open your browser's developer console (right-click → Inspect → Console tab) and paste any red errors here, that's super helpful. Don't worry if you can't.
